description: Execution governance for OpenClaw terminal operations in Dirac automation (elevated full-auto mode).
notes: Elevated by user request: all commands default to auto_allow for autonomous remote debugging.
Policy is aligned to currently approved device scopes; subprocess execution remains governed by audit + report traceability.
Policy intent: OpenClaw acts as full-auto control-plane agent (planner+executor+reviewer) with auditable guardrails.
